items.title: Blueprint directory path mismatch: configs/templates/ vs configs/blueprints/
items.description: The 6 blueprint YAMLs live in configs/templates/ but ARCHITECTURE.md and CLAUDE.md specify configs/blueprints/ as the target path. CQ-009 (blueprint loader) must know which path to use. Must resolve before CQ-009 implementation or the loader will target wrong directory.
items.groomingNotes: Blocking: resolve before CQ-009 sprint. Decision needed: rename configs/templates/ to configs/blueprints/ OR update loader to use templates/. Rename preferred — aligns with canonical terminology. Single-step fix.
items.intent: Resolve the blueprint directory path to a single canonical location before CQ-009 implementation. The loader must not guess which directory to read.

items.title: src/ scaffold has server/ and ui/ dirs not in target architecture
items.description: Empty scaffold directories src/server/ and src/ui/ exist but are absent from the target package structure defined in CLAUDE.md and ARCHITECTURE.md. The web dashboard (CQ-040) uses Hono but no specific src path is defined for it. These directories will cause confusion during Track E (source reorganization). Should either add them to the target architecture spec or remove them from scaffold.
items.groomingNotes: Low-urgency. Options: (a) add src/server/ and src/ui/ to target architecture in CLAUDE.md/ARCHITECTURE.md for CQ-040 web dashboard, or (b) delete empty dirs and let CQ-040 create them. Recommend option (a) — update architecture docs to include web server path.
items.intent: Decide whether src/server/ and src/ui/ belong in the target architecture or should be removed. No orphaned scaffold directories that contradict the spec.
